section.heading: Salaries payable monthly after taking oath

content.p: Each Member and Delegate, after he has taken and subscribed the required oath, is entitled to receive his salary at the end of each month.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 35 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
R.S. § 39 derived from Res. Mar. 29, 1867, No. 18, 15 Stat. 24.
